privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.html:
This fallback copy ships with the static site. Edit policy_pages in Supabase or replace entries in data/policies-fallback.json for CMS-style updates without redeploying HTML.

Information we collect

Order details, contact information, and usage data as described in your live privacy programme.
